prompt:
Add failing tests for Kelvin conversion to tests/convert.test.js:
- toKelvin(0) === 273.15
- toKelvin(100) === 373.15
- fromKelvin(273.15) === 0
- fromKelvin(0) === -273.15

Do NOT modify bin/convert.js yet — tests must FAIL.
Then claim and close the test issue from the tracker.
